answers.question: Deploy codegen first target
answers.answer: k8s Deployment + Service manifest as the first codegen target. Production-grade output.

answers.question: Deploy section validation blocking behavior
answers.answer: Soft warning — warn on inconsistencies but don't block spec creation. Cross-ref validation to db-model and rest-api deferred to later iteration.

answers.question: Frontend framework target for wireframe codegen
answers.answer: React as the first target framework.

answers.question: Scope of frontend cross-section composition
answers.answer: Full scope — all 3 phases in this change: wireframe to React scaffold, DTCG design tokens to CSS/Tailwind, CEM to TypeScript interface + component skeleton. Cross-ref to rest-api for data fetching hooks included.

answers.question: Shared validator infrastructure
answers.answer: Introduce a unified validator registration mechanism shared by both deploy and frontend section types.
